user.title: GoveeLife Water Leak
user.description: Sign in with your Govee Home account. Govee may email you a verification code on the next step.

code.title: Email verification
code.description: Govee emailed a verification code to your account. Enter it below to finish setup.

error.invalid_code: The verification code was invalid or has expired.
error.code_request_failed: Could not request a verification code from Govee.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Govee. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Govee account is already configured.
